Uses of Class
com.rays.common.ORSResponse

  • Packages that use ORSResponse 
    Package Description
    com.rays.common  
    com.rays.ctl  

    • Uses of ORSResponse in com.rays.common

      Methods in com.rays.common that return ORSResponse 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      ORSResponse BaseCtl.deleteMany​(java.lang.String[] ids, java.lang.String pageNo, F form)
      Deletes multiple records by their IDs.
      ORSResponse BaseCtl.get​(long id)
      Retrieves a record by its ID.
      ORSResponse BaseCtl.save​(F form, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
      Saves or updates a record.
      ORSResponse BaseCtl.search​(F form, int pageNo)
      Searches for records based on the provided criteria with pagination.
      ORSResponse BaseCtl.validate​(org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
      Validates the binding result and returns validation errors if any.

    • Uses of ORSResponse in com.rays.ctl

      Methods in com.rays.ctl that return ORSResponse 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      ORSResponse UserCtl.changePassword​(@Valid ChangePasswordForm form, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
      Changes the password for a user after validating the old password.
      ORSResponse MarksheetCtl.getMeritList()
      Retrieves the merit list of students based on their marks.
      ORSResponse LoginCtl.login​(@Valid LoginForm form, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult, javax.servlet.http.HttpSession session, javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
      Authenticates a user and generates a JWT token upon successful login.
      ORSResponse LoginCtl.logout​(javax.servlet.http.HttpSession session)
      Logs out the current user by invalidating the HTTP session.
      ORSResponse UserCtl.myProfile​(@Valid MyProfileForm form, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
      Updates the profile information of the currently logged-in user.
      ORSResponse ContactCtl.preload()
      Preloads any necessary data required before loading the contact form.
      ORSResponse FacultyCtl.preload()
      Preloads dropdown lists required for the faculty form.
      ORSResponse MarksheetCtl.preload()
      Preloads the list of students for the marksheet form.
      ORSResponse RoleCtl.preload()
      Preloads the list of roles for dropdown selection.
      ORSResponse StudentCtl.preload()
      Preloads the list of colleges for the student form.
      ORSResponse SubjectCtl.preload()
      Preloads the list of courses for the subject form.
      ORSResponse TimeTableCtl.preload()
      Preloads the lists of courses and subjects for the timetable form.
      ORSResponse UserCtl.preload()
      Preloads the list of roles for the user form.
      ORSResponse MarksheetCtl.rollNo​(java.lang.String rollNo)
      Finds a marksheet by its roll number.
      ORSResponse LoginCtl.signUp​(@Valid UserRegistrationForm form, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
      Registers a new user in the system.
      ORSResponse TestCtl.TestAdd()
      Test endpoint that returns a sample ORSResponse with various data types.
      ORSResponse UserCtl.uploadPic​(java.lang.Long userId, org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile file, javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest req)
      Uploads a profile picture for a user.
